settings.heroIntro: Live updates from the Cherupushpa Mission League Kothamangalam Diocese — competitions, announcements, and galleries.

announcements.text: Mekhala Kalolsavam 2026 is scheduled to be held at Karimannoor on July 4-5. Online registration portal has started!
CML Kaliyar Mekhala Golden Jubilee Year celebration guidelines have been distributed to all parish directors.
Unit Secretaries should submit the mid-term membership reports before June 5, 2026.

news.title: Mekhala Leaders Workshop Concluded at St. Marys Hall Kaliyar
news.body: The annual leadership seminar and training workshop for parish unit bearers of Cherupushpa Mission League Kaliyar Mekhala was held successfully. Over 80 student leaders and animator sisters from 11 parish units participated. Rev. Fr. Mathew Elanjimattom inaugurated the session, urging youngsters to embrace the missionary spirit in their daily routines, embodying the CML ideals of Love, Sacrifice, Service, and Suffering.

news.title: Golden Jubilee Celebration Preparations Commences
news.body: CML Kaliyar Mekhala has officially formed the executive committee for planning the upcoming Golden Jubilee celebrations. Various spiritual, social service, and literary events will be hosted throughout the academic year. Bishop of Kothamangalam Diocese will join the central opening ceremony.

units.name: St. Marys Church, Kaliyar
units.description: Mekhala Headquarters. Extremely active unit leading spiritual quiz groups, social volunteering drives, and charity works in Kaliyar parish.

units.name: St. Sebastian Church, Vannappuram
units.description: The largest parish unit in Kaliyar Mekhala, consistently winning laurels in literary (Sahithyamalsaram) and cultural stages.

units.name: St. George Church, Kodikulam
units.description: A dedicated unit known for exceptional Holy Childhood missionary savings bank accounts and pious service works.

units.name: St. Augustine Church, Karimannoor
units.description: Historically significant unit that regularly produces excellent theatrical performances and organizes regional mission retreats.

units.name: St. Thomas Church, Thommankuthu
units.description: Set in a beautiful scenic tourism belt, this unit excels in nature volunteering and holy standard-keeping classes.

events.title: Mekhala Kalolsavam 2026
events.venue: St. Augustine Higher Secondary School, Karimannoor
events.description: The grand annual cultural fiesta of Kaliyar Mekhala where hundreds of children showcase their Talents in group song, Margam Kali, Elocution, Painting, and Bible Skits. Registrations are open through unit secretaries.

events.title: Feast of St. Therese (Patroness Feast Day)
events.venue: St. Mary’s Forane Church HQ, Kaliyar
events.description: Solemn Holy Mass, Novena, Candlelight procession, and distribution of rose petals. Followed by annual missionary award announcement.

events.title: Mekhala Sahithyamalsaram 2025
events.description: Literary competition focusing on Malayalam Essay Writing, Bible Verse recitation, Storytelling, and Mission Poetry. Vannappuram Unit emerged Overall Champions.
events.summary: Vannappuram parish unit scored 112 points to win the rolling trophy. Kodikulam secured second place with 84 points. Bishop of Kothamangalam presented the trophies.

galleryAlbums.title: CML Mekhala Kalolsavam Highlights
galleryAlbums.description: Spectacular visual memories of theatrical plays, religious songs, and cultural quiz stages.

galleryAlbums.title: Mekhala Leaders Training Camp
galleryAlbums.description: Nurturing future church leaders with high spiritual morals, team building, and social values.

downloads.title: CML Kalolsavam 2026 Registration Sheet
downloads.description: Authorized spreadsheet template for unit secretaries to compile parish entry submissions.

downloads.title: CML Kaliyar Mekhala Calendar & Activities Planner 2026
downloads.description: The complete agenda, circular directives, exam dates, and prayer guidelines for the whole year.

downloads.title: Midterm Report Template (June 2026)
downloads.description: Prescribed report form to document member collections, missionary box stats, and unit activities.
